title: The sloe was lost in flower,
content:
The sloe was lost in flower,
    The April elm was dim;
    That was the lover�s hour,
    The hour for lies and him.

    If thorns are all the bower,
    If north winds freeze the fir,
    Why, �tis another�s hour,
    The hour for truth and her.
meaning:
"The sloe was lost in flower," is a quintessential example of Alfred Edward Housman's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
